title: Creating Variables
text: Let: $$x$$ be the cost of the gym membership (base fee), and $$y$$ is the cost of each personal training session.

title: Setting up System of Equations
text: Set up the system of equations: $$x+2y=125(Equation$$ 1), $$x+5y=260(Equation$$ 2)

title: Using Elimination
text: Subtract Equation $$1$$ from Equation $$2$$. We eliminate $$x$$ to solve for $$y$$. $$x+5y-x+2y=260-125$$. Solve for $$y$$.
